problem id: 86b727ff
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(5) XOR SHR(6)) AND ROT(3)

examples:
  10100011 -> 00000000
  00100101 -> 00100000
  11010100 -> 10000010
  01100011 -> 00000001
  00100000 -> 00000000
  00100100 -> 00000000
  10100000 -> 00000000
  10110111 -> 10100000
  01111000 -> 00000001
  00011010 -> 01000000

query: 10011011
predicted answer: 01000000
